title: Remove inotify work around
body:
https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/1215 fixed issue with podman blowing up inotify

Addresses https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/1215#issuecomment-410461385

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
I'm not sure what the bot is complaining about here, as you've contributed to this repo before...

:pushpin: Commit 7e0a4a8 has been approved by `baude`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
